ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "report_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of interest rate (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" TEXT /* Maximum loan amount */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" TEXT /* Minimum loan amount */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Typical term of the loan in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dwelling_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dwelling unit type */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of dwelling unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dwelling unit type */,
  "average_unit_size" TEXT /* Average size of units in the dwelling type */,
  "average_unit_value" TEXT /* Average value of units in the dwelling type */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units in the dwelling type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_unit_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dwelling unit type */,
  "unit_count" INTEGER /* Number of units associated with the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_unit_mapping_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES dwelling_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, auditor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
